_metadata.description: Controlled vocabulary for the 18 user wellness goals shown in onboarding and the goals screen. Presentation layer for goals; cluster-mapping data (which clusters drive recommendations for each goal) lives in user_goals_to_clusters.json. The 18 IDs MUST match between these two files. Migrating gives clinician control of the user-facing goal copy and priority weighting.
_metadata.purpose: Single source of truth for goal labels, descriptions, priority tier, and cross-references to relevant condition_ids / drug_class_ids. Drives the personalization layer (which goals surface which products, which goals affect interaction-warning relevance).
_metadata.alignment: Pipeline source: scripts/data/user_goals_to_clusters.json (18 mapping entries; same IDs). Flutter consumer: lib/core/constants/schema_ids.dart `goals` + `goalLabels` + `goalPriorities` (replaces hardcoded maps).

field_contract.id: Stable UPPER_SNAKE identifier prefixed GOAL_. Shared with user_goals_to_clusters.json.
field_contract.name: User-facing label shown in onboarding and the goals screen.
field_contract.notes: ≤200-char plain-English description shown in tap-to-learn modal.
field_contract.priority: Tier hint for default sort/recommendation weight. One of: high | medium | low.
field_contract.related_condition_ids: Optional. Condition IDs (from condition_vocab.json) that often co-occur with this goal — used for context-relevant warnings.
field_contract.related_drug_class_ids: Optional. Drug-class IDs (from drug_class_vocab.json) that often co-occur with this goal.

user_goals.name: Sleep Quality
user_goals.notes: Improve sleep onset, depth, or duration. Common targets: melatonin, magnesium glycinate, L-theanine, valerian, glycine.

user_goals.name: Reduce Stress/Anxiety
user_goals.notes: Lower stress reactivity and tension. Common targets: ashwagandha, L-theanine, magnesium, rhodiola, holy basil.

user_goals.name: Increase Energy
user_goals.notes: Reduce fatigue and improve daytime stamina. Common targets: B-complex, CoQ10, iron (if low), creatine, ginseng, rhodiola.

user_goals.name: Digestive Health
user_goals.notes: Support gut function and reduce GI symptoms. Common targets: probiotics, prebiotics, digestive enzymes, fiber, glutamine.

user_goals.name: Weight Management
user_goals.notes: Support healthy body composition. Common targets: protein, fiber, green tea extract, berberine, conjugated linoleic acid (CLA).

user_goals.name: Cardiovascular/Heart Health
user_goals.notes: Support heart, vessels, and lipid profile. Common targets: omega-3 (EPA/DHA), CoQ10, garlic, hawthorn, plant sterols.

user_goals.name: Healthy Aging/Longevity
user_goals.notes: Cellular and metabolic resilience over time. Common targets: NAD+ precursors, resveratrol, omega-3, vitamin D, polyphenols.

user_goals.name: Blood Sugar Support
user_goals.notes: Improve glycemic control. Common targets: berberine, chromium, alpha-lipoic acid, cinnamon, magnesium.

user_goals.name: Immune Support
user_goals.notes: Strengthen immune defense. Common targets: vitamin D, vitamin C, zinc, elderberry, beta-glucans, probiotics.

user_goals.name: Focus & Mental Clarity
user_goals.notes: Improve attention, working memory, and processing speed. Common targets: caffeine + L-theanine, omega-3, B-complex, lion's mane, bacopa.

user_goals.name: Mood & Emotional Wellness
user_goals.notes: Support emotional regulation. Common targets: omega-3 EPA-rich, vitamin D, SAMe, saffron, B-complex, magnesium.

user_goals.name: Muscle Growth & Recovery
user_goals.notes: Support training adaptation and recovery. Common targets: whey protein, creatine, branched-chain amino acids, beta-alanine, vitamin D.

user_goals.name: Joint & Bone Mobility
user_goals.notes: Support joint comfort and bone density. Common targets: glucosamine + chondroitin, collagen, vitamin D, calcium, magnesium, vitamin K2.

user_goals.name: Skin, Hair, & Nails
user_goals.notes: Support keratin and collagen synthesis. Common targets: biotin, collagen peptides, vitamin C, zinc, omega-3, silica.

user_goals.name: Liver & Detox Support
user_goals.notes: Support hepatic detoxification pathways. Common targets: milk thistle, NAC, alpha-lipoic acid, dandelion root, B-complex.

user_goals.name: Prenatal/Pregnancy Support
user_goals.notes: Pregnancy or pre-conception nutrition. Common targets: prenatal multivitamin (with folate), omega-3 DHA, iron, choline, vitamin D.

user_goals.name: Hormonal Balance
user_goals.notes: Support endocrine regulation. Common targets: ashwagandha, vitex (chasteberry), magnesium, omega-3, vitamin D, zinc.

user_goals.name: Eye & Vision Health
user_goals.notes: Support retinal and macular health. Common targets: lutein, zeaxanthin, omega-3 DHA, vitamin A, vitamin C, zinc.
